en.name: Rayrage, the Twilight Fiend
en.effect: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 Pendulum Monster you control; place that Pendulum Monster in your Pendulum Zone (but it cannot activate its Pendulum Effects this turn), and if you do, Special Summon this card. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then target 1 card in your Pendulum Zone; it cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects this turn. You can only use each effect of "Rayrage, the Twilight Fiend" once per turn.
en.pendulumEffect: If a Pendulum Monster(s) you control would be destroyed by an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead of 1 of those Pendulum Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Rayrage, the Twilight Fiend" once per turn.

ja.name: 薄明の魔 レイラージュ

zh-CN.name: 薄明之魔 雷拉曙
zh-CN.effect: 此卡名的①②怪兽效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡存在于手牌的情况下，以自己场上的1只灵摆怪兽为对象可以发动。将该灵摆怪兽放在自己的灵摆区域，将此卡特殊召唤。以此效果所放在灵摆区域的卡的灵摆效果此回合不可发动。②：在自己・对手回合中，解放此卡，以自己灵摆区域的1张卡为对象可以发动。此回合，该卡不会因对手的效果被破坏。
zh-CN.pendulumEffect: 此卡名的灵摆效果1回合仅可使用1次。①：自己场上的灵摆怪兽将被对手的效果破坏的情况下，作为该1只将被破坏的灵摆怪兽的代替，可将此卡破坏。
